QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_64

question.text: NPS Vatsalya is designed for which category of subscribers?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** NPS Vatsalya is designed for minor children (below 18 years). Parents or guardians contribute on behalf of the child. **The Trap:** NPS Vatsalya is not a senior citizen or women-specific scheme. It is exclusively for minors with parent/guardian contributing. **Cross-Exam Context:** NPS Vatsalya: min Rs.1,000/year, no max, converts to regular NPS at 18, exit at 18 has 80% annuity + 20% lump sum. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Position NPS Vatsalya as a long-term retirement savings tool for children. Starting at birth gives maximum compounding benefit.
